query:
SELECT u.id as userId, u.name, st.id as stampTransactionId, st.orderId, st.stamps, st.action, o.orderNumber, o.orderStatus
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN stamp_transactions st ON st.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN orders o ON st.orderId = o.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Rangan%';
